name: Bug report
about: Report a bug or incorrect behavior

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## To Reproduce

Steps or a minimal code snippet that reproduces the issue:

```zig
// minimal repro
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces if available.

## Environment

- Zig version: <!-- `zig version` -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Linux x86_64, macOS arm64 -->
- zhttp3 version/commit: <!-- tag or commit hash -->

## Additional Context

Any other context (RFC section, related issues, etc.).
